clientFunction.name: trigger_file_upload
clientFunction.description: Opens the file explorer. Input mime_type to restrict selection (e.g., 'application/pdf', 'image/png', 'image/jpeg', 'image/jpg'). Also provided the signed_url argument.

mime_type.description: The allowed file type, e.g., 'application/pdf' or 'audio/*'

signed_url.description: The GCS signed URL which the file should be uploaded to

extraction_result.description: The result of the document extraction.

gcs_uri.description: The GCS URI to the file.

message.description: The result of the file upload
